
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// LAYER 1: EVENTBUS
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════
var EVENTBUS = {
    _l: {},
    _h: [],
    on: function(e, f) {
        if (!this._l[e]) this._l[e] = [];
        this._l[e].push(f);
    },
    emit: function(e, d) {
        this._h.push({e:e, d:d, t:Date.now()});
        if (this._h.length > 300) this._h = this._h.slice(-200);
        var fs = this._l[e];
        if (fs) { for (var i = 0; i < fs.length; i++) { try { fs[i](d); } catch(x) { console.error('EB:', e, x); } } }
    },
    off: function(e, f) {
        if (!this._l[e]) return;
        this._l[e] = this._l[e].filter(function(x) { return x !== f; });
    }
};

// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// LAYER 2: LOGGER
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════
var LOGGER = {
    logs: [],
    MAX: 500,
    _log: function(lv, cat, msg, data) {
        var entry = {lv:lv, cat:cat, msg:msg, data:data, ts:Date.now()};
        this.logs.push(entry);
        if (this.logs.length > this.MAX) this.logs = this.logs.slice(-400);
        var cl = {DEBUG:'#64748b',INFO:'#3b82f6',WARN:'#f97316',ERROR:'#ef4444'};
        console.log('%c[' + lv + '] ' + cat + ': ' + msg, 'color:' + (cl[lv]||'#94a3b8'), data||'');
        if (lv === 'ERROR') EVENTBUS.emit('error', entry);
    },
    debug: function(c, m, d) { this._log('DEBUG', c, m, d); },
    info: function(c, m, d) { this._log('INFO', c, m, d); },
    warn: function(c, m, d) { this._log('WARN', c, m, d); },
    error: function(c, m, d) { this._log('ERROR', c, m, d); },
    getErrors: function() { return this.logs.filter(function(l) { return l.lv === 'ERROR'; }); },
    getRecent: function(n) { return this.logs.slice(-(n || 20)); },
    getAll: function() { return this.logs; },
    clear: function() { this.logs = []; }
};

// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// LAYER 3: SEC (Security — OWASP 2025 for LLMs)
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════
var SEC = {
    sanitize: function(input) {
        if (typeof input !== 'string') return '';
        return input.replace(/&/g,'&amp;').replace(/</g,'&lt;').replace(/>/g,'&gt;').replace(/"/g,'&quot;').replace(/'/g,'&#39;').replace(/`/g,'&#96;');
    },
    safeJSON: function(obj) {
        return JSON.stringify(obj).replace(/</g,'\\u003C').replace(/>/g,'\\u003E');
    },
    sanitizePrompt: function(p) {
        if (typeof p !== 'string') return '';
        var pats = [
            /ignore\s+(all\s+)?previous\s+instructions/gi,
            /forget\s+(your\s+)?(instructions|training)/gi,
            /you\s+are\s+now/gi,
            /act\s+as/gi,
            /pretend\s+(to\s+be|you\s+are)/gi,
            /تجاهل\s*(كل)?\s*التعليمات/gi,
            /أنت\s+الآن/gi,
            /\[SYSTEM\]/gi,
            /<\|im_start\|>/gi,
            /<\|endoftext\|>/gi
        ];
        var c = p;
        for (var i = 0; i < pats.length; i++) c = c.replace(pats[i], '[blocked]');
        return c;
    },
    renderMD: function(text) {
        if (!text) return '';
        var s = this.sanitize(text);
        s = s.replace(/```([\s\S]*?)```/g, '<pre><code>$1</code></pre>');
        s = s.replace(/`([^`]+)`/g, '<code style="background:rgba(0,255,136,0.1);padding:2px 5px;border-radius:4px">$1</code>');
        s = s.replace(/\*\*([^*]+)\*\*/g, '<strong>$1</strong>');
        s = s.replace(/\*([^*]+)\*/g, '<em>$1</em>');
        s = s.replace(/\n/g, '<br>');
        return s;
    },
    validateAgent: function(a) {
        if (!a || typeof a !== 'object' || !a.name) return null;
        return {
            id: 'agent_' + Date.now() + '_' + Math.random().toString(36).substr(2,6),
            name: this.sanitize(a.name).substring(0,100),
            name_en: this.sanitize(a.name_en||'').substring(0,100),
            icon: (a.icon||'🤖').substring(0,4),
            domain: this.sanitize(a.domain||'custom').substring(0,30),
            desc: this.sanitize(a.desc||'').substring(0,500),
            model_id: this.sanitize(a.model_id||'gpt-4o').substring(0,60),
            fallback_model: this.sanitize(a.fallback_model||'gpt-4o-mini').substring(0,60),
            framework: this.sanitize(a.framework||'standard').substring(0,20),
            modLevel: Math.min(5, Math.max(0, parseInt(a.modLevel)||2)),
            temperature: Math.min(1.5, Math.max(0, parseFloat(a.temperature)||0.7)),
            capabilities: Array.isArray(a.capabilities) ? a.capabilities.slice(0,10) : [],
            knowledge: this.sanitize(a.knowledge||'').substring(0,5000),
            system_prompt: (a.system_prompt||'').substring(0,10000),
            dna: a.dna||null,
            quality_score: Math.min(100, Math.max(0, parseInt(a.quality_score)||0)),
            xp: parseInt(a.xp)||0,
            chatCount: parseInt(a.chatCount)||0,
            deployed: false,
            deploy_url: '',
            createdAt: a.createdAt || new Date().toISOString()
        };
    },
    applyCSP: function() {
        try {
            var m = document.createElement('meta');
            m.httpEquiv = 'Content-Security-Policy';
            m.content = "default-src 'self' https://js.puter.com https://fonts.googleapis.com https://fonts.gstatic.com; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' 'unsafe-eval' https://js.puter.com; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com; img-src * data: blob:; connect-src *; media-src * blob:;";
            document.head.appendChild(m);
        } catch(e) { LOGGER.debug('CSP', 'Failed: ' + e.message); }
    }
};

// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// LAYER 4: PERF
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════
var PERF = {
    debounce: function(fn, d) {
        var t;
        return function() {
            var s = this, a = arguments;
            clearTimeout(t);
            t = setTimeout(function() { fn.apply(s, a); }, d);
        };
    },
    throttle: function(fn, lim) {
        var last = 0;
        return function() {
            var now = Date.now();
            if (now - last >= lim) { last = now; fn.apply(this, arguments); }
        };
    },
    trimHistory: function(h, mid) {
        var limits = {
            'google/gemini-2.5-pro':200, 'google/gemini-2.5-flash':200,
            'gpt-5-nano':100, 'gpt-5-mini':100, 'o3':100, 'o4-mini':100,
            'claude-opus-4-6':100, 'claude-sonnet-4-6':100,
            'gpt-4.1':80, 'gpt-4o':80, 'grok-3-mini':80,
            'deepseek-r1':60, 'deepseek-chat':60
        };
        var mx = limits[mid] || 60;
        return h.length > mx ? h.slice(-mx) : h;
    },
    paginate: function(items, page, ps) {
        ps = ps || 12;
        var total = Math.ceil(items.length / ps);
        var p = Math.max(1, Math.min(page, total || 1));
        var start = (p - 1) * ps;
        return {items: items.slice(start, start + ps), page: p, total: total, hasNext: p < total, hasPrev: p > 1};
    }
};

// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// LAYER 5: RESILIENCE (Circuit Breaker + Retry)
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════
var RESILIENCE = {
    circuits: {},
    TH: {fails:3, timeout:30000, halfOpen:60000},
    getCircuit: function(id) {
        if (!this.circuits[id]) this.circuits[id] = {state:'CLOSED', failures:0, lastFail:0};
        return this.circuits[id];
    },
    isOpen: function(id) {
        var c = this.getCircuit(id);
        if (c.state === 'CLOSED') return false;
        if (c.state === 'OPEN') {
            if (Date.now() - c.lastFail > this.TH.halfOpen) {
                c.state = 'HALF_OPEN';
                LOGGER.info('CIRCUIT', id + ' => HALF_OPEN');
                return false;
            }
            return true;
        }
        return false;
    },
    recordOK: function(id) { var c = this.getCircuit(id); c.failures = 0; c.state = 'CLOSED'; },
    recordFail: function(id) {
        var c = this.getCircuit(id);
        c.failures++;
        c.lastFail = Date.now();
        if (c.failures >= this.TH.fails) {
            c.state = 'OPEN';
            LOGGER.warn('CIRCUIT', id + ' => OPEN (' + c.failures + ' fails)');
            EVENTBUS.emit('circuit-open', {id:id});
        }
    },
    callSafe: function(modelId, fn, fallbackFn, retries) {
        var self = this;
        var mx = retries || 2;
        return new Promise(function(resolve, reject) {
            if (self.isOpen(modelId)) {
                LOGGER.warn('RES', 'Circuit OPEN: ' + modelId);
                if (fallbackFn) { fallbackFn().then(resolve).catch(reject); }
                else { reject(new Error('Circuit open: ' + modelId)); }
                return;
            }
            var attempt = function(i) {
                var tout = new Promise(function(_, rj) {
                    setTimeout(function() { rj(new Error('Timeout 30s')); }, self.TH.timeout);
                });
                Promise.race([fn(), tout]).then(function(r) {
                    self.recordOK(modelId);
                    resolve(r);
                }).catch(function(err) {
                    LOGGER.warn('RES', 'Attempt ' + (i+1) + ' fail: ' + modelId + ' - ' + err.message);
                    self.recordFail(modelId);
                    if (i < mx - 1) {
                        var delay = Math.pow(2, i) * 1000 + Math.random() * 500;
                        setTimeout(function() { attempt(i + 1); }, delay);
                    } else if (fallbackFn) {
                        LOGGER.warn('RES', 'Fallback for ' + modelId);
                        fallbackFn().then(resolve).catch(reject);
                    } else { reject(err); }
                });
            };
            attempt(0);
        });
    }
};

// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// LAYER 6: MODELS (30 Models — March 2026)
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════
var MODELS = [
    {id:'claude-opus-4-6',n:'Claude Opus 4.6',p:'Anthropic',icon:'🟣',tier:'elite',ctx:200000,vision:true,desc:'أقوى نموذج أنثروبيك للمهام المعقدة'},
    {id:'claude-sonnet-4-6',n:'Claude Sonnet 4.6',p:'Anthropic',icon:'🟣',tier:'pro',ctx:200000,vision:true,desc:'توازن بين القوة والسرعة'},
    {id:'claude-opus-4-5',n:'Claude Opus 4.5',p:'Anthropic',icon:'🟣',tier:'elite',ctx:200000,vision:true,desc:'نموذج متقدم من أنثروبيك'},

// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// LAYER 7: VIGIL Guardian v3
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════
var VIGIL = {
    _iv: null,
    checks: {puter:false, storage:false, agents:false, perf:false, errors:false},
    health: 0,
    start: function() {
        var s = this;
        LOGGER.info('VIGIL', 'Guardian v3 starting...');
        s.runAll();
        s._iv = setInterval(function() { s.runAll(); }, 180000);
    },
    stop: function() {
        if (this._iv) { clearInterval(this._iv); this._iv = null; LOGGER.info('VIGIL', 'Stopped'); }
    },
    runAll: function() {
        var s = this;
        s.checkPuter(); s.checkStorage(); s.checkAgents(); s.checkPerf(); s.checkErrors();
        var p = 0;
        var ks = ['puter','storage','agents','perf','errors'];
        for (var i = 0; i < ks.length; i++) { if (s.checks[ks[i]]) p++; }
        s.health = Math.round((p / 5) * 100);
        var el = document.getElementById('stH');
        if (el) {
            var em = s.health >= 80 ? '💚' : s.health >= 50 ? '💛' : '❤️';
            el.textContent = em + ' صحة: ' + s.health + '%';
        }
    },
    checkPuter: function() {
        var s = this;
        try {
            if (typeof puter !== 'undefined' && puter.kv) {
                var tk = 'vping_' + Date.now();
                puter.kv.set(tk, 'ok').then(function() {
                    return puter.kv.get(tk);
                }).then(function(v) {
                    s.checks.puter = (v === 'ok');
                    return puter.kv.del(tk);
                }).catch(function(e) {
                    s.checks.puter = false;
                    LOGGER.debug('VIGIL', 'Puter ping fail: ' + e.message);
                });
            } else { s.checks.puter = false; }
        } catch(e) { s.checks.puter = false; LOGGER.debug('VIGIL', e.message); }
    },
    checkStorage: function() {
        var s = this;
        try {
            if (typeof puter !== 'undefined' && puter.kv) {
                puter.kv.get('hf_agents').then(function() { s.checks.storage = true; }).catch(function() { s.checks.storage = false; });
            } else {
                localStorage.getItem('hf_agents');
                s.checks.storage = true;
            }
        } catch(e) { s.checks.storage = false; }
    },
    checkAgents: function() {
        try {
            if (typeof F !== 'undefined' && F.agents) {
                var fx = 0;
                for (var i = 0; i < F.agents.length; i++) {
                    var a = F.agents[i];
                    if (!a.id) { a.id = 'fix_' + Date.now() + '_' + i; fx++; }
                    if (!a.name) { a.name = 'وكيل'; fx++; }
                    if (!a.system_prompt) { a.system_prompt = 'أنت مساعد ذكي.'; fx++; }
                }
                if (fx > 0) { LOGGER.warn('VIGIL', 'Fixed ' + fx + ' issues'); F.saveData(); }
                this.checks.agents = true;
            } else { this.checks.agents = true; }
        } catch(e) { this.checks.agents = false; }
    },
    checkPerf: function() {
        try {
            if (typeof F !== 'undefined' && F.chatHistory && F.chatHistory.length > 80) {
                F.chatHistory = F.chatHistory.slice(-60);
                LOGGER.info('VIGIL', 'Trimmed chatHistory');
            }
            this.checks.perf = true;
        } catch(e) { this.checks.perf = false; }
    },
    checkErrors: function() {
        try {
            var recent = LOGGER.logs.filter(function(l) { return l.lv === 'ERROR' && (Date.now() - l.ts) < 60000; });
            this.checks.errors = (recent.length < 10);
        } catch(e) { this.checks.errors = true; }
    }
};
